agents.name: junior-dev
agents.description: Code implementer — handles writing, editing, and testing
sample_prompts: Implement a function to validate email addresses using regex
Fix the authentication module to handle expired tokens
Add TypeScript interfaces for the API response types

agents.name: context-scout
agents.description: Broad codebase survey and evidence gathering
sample_prompts: Survey the authentication layer to understand current token handling
Analyze the project's error handling patterns across all modules
Identify all external dependencies used in the codebase

agents.name: context-insurgent
agents.description: Deep, narrow code analysis for specific issues
sample_prompts: Deep analyze the OAuth implementation for security vulnerabilities
Trace the execution path of user login flow end-to-end
Find all instances where user input is processed unsafely

agents.name: tailwrench
sample_prompts: Verify the build passes and all tests are passing
Check code coverage for the authentication module
Validate that the API responses match the OpenAPI specification

agents.name: external-scout
sample_prompts: Research best practices for JWT token expiration timing
Find recent security vulnerabilities in our dependencies
Search for performance optimization techniques for databases

agents.name: documentation-expert
sample_prompts: Write comprehensive API documentation for the authentication endpoints
Create a deployment guide for the new features
Update the README with the latest project structure

agents.name: headwrench
sample_prompts: Plan the implementation of OAuth2 authentication support
Decompose the refactoring of the database layer
Plan the migration to TypeScript for the backend

agents.name: autonomous-agent
sample_prompts: Autonomously fix all linting errors in the codebase
Autonomously add missing error handling throughout the app
Autonomously optimize database query performance

subagent_tests.description: Test individual agents with representative prompts

e2e_tests.description: End-to-end DAG execution tests with planning

code_validation.description: All code must compile and pass syntax checks

verification_accuracy.description: All verification checks must pass tests and linters

citation_traceability.description: All claims must be traceable to source documents

source_confidence_tagging.description: All external sources must be tagged with confidence levels

factual_accuracy.description: All factual claims must be verified and accurate

convention_adherence.description: All code must follow project conventions

contradiction_preservation.description: Conflicting viewpoints must be preserved and noted

convergence_gate.description: Stop optimization when improvement <2% for 3 consecutive iterations
